narrative:
Mantua Township has 3,367 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
